functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.redhat.rpmdb.open_db
documentation:
Attempts to open an RPM database from the specified file path and returns
an RpmDB instance. If the database is invalid or the metadata cannot be
validated, None is returned.

The function first tries to open the database as an SQLite database, and
if that fails, it attempts to open it as a Berkeley DB. If both attempts
fail, None is returned.

```
param file_path

The path to the RPM database file.

type file_path

str

return

An RpmDB instance if the database is valid, otherwise None.

rtype

RpmDB | None
```

functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.redhat.rpmdb.berkeley.hash_metadata_page.parse_hash_metadata_page
documentation:
Parses a HashMetadataPage from a bytes object.

```
param data

A bytes object containing the metadata page data.

type data

bytes

return

An instance of HashMetadataPage.

rtype

HashMetadataPage

raises ValueError | InvalidMetadata

If the data is invalid or parsing
fails.
```

functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.java.maven_repo_utils.get_dependency_version
documentation: Retrieve specific dependency version from dependency management.

functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.java.maven_repo_utils.process_pom
documentation: Process POM to either get the version or update parent details.

functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.java.parse_java_manifest._field_value_from_manifest
documentation:
Extract a field's value from a JavaManifest file.

Args:
    manifest (JavaManifest): The JavaManifest file from where the field
        value has to be extracted.
    field (str): The specific field name which value is needed.

Returns:
    str: The field value extracted from the Manifest file if it exists,
        else returns an empty string.

functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.java.parse_java_manifest.select_licenses
documentation:
Select licenses from a JavaManifest

Args:
    manifest (JavaManifest): the JavaManifest containing licenses

Returns:
    list[str]: A list of licenses extracted from the manifest

functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.java.parse_java_manifest.extract_name_from_apache_maven_bundle_plugin
documentation:
Extract the name from Apache Maven bundle plugin using manifest main
information. If successful, the function tries to split the symbolic name
according to convention `"${groupId}.${artifactId}"` and return the
artifactId. If this process fails or the vendor id is equal to the
symbolic name, an empty string is returned.

Args:
    manifest (JavaManifest | None): The JavaManifest object containing the
    manifest main information or None.

Returns:
    str: The extracted name from the Apache Maven bundle plugin, or an
    empty string if extraction fails.

functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.java.parse_java_manifest.is_valid_java_identifier
documentation:
Check if a string is a valid Java identifier.

An identifier is a name assigned to elements in the Java program i.e.
variable, method, class etc.

Args:
    field (str): The string to be checked if it is a valid Java identifier.

Returns:
    bool: True if the string is a valid Java identifier, False otherwise.

functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.java.parse_java_manifest.extract_name_from_archive_filename
documentation:
Extracts name from an ArchiveFilename

This function extracts the name from the provided ArchiveFilename.
It handles special cases for `org.eclipse.*` group IDs. For valid Java
identifiers, it returns the last part as the artifact ID.

Args:
    archive (ArchiveFilename): Given archive filename from which the name
    needs to be extracted.

Returns:
    str: The extracted name from the ArchiveFilename.

functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.java.parse_java_manifest.select_name
documentation:
Select a name from various sources based on the manifest and filename
object

Args:
    manifest (JavaManifest | None): The Java Manifest input from which to
    extract the name
    filename_obj (ArchiveFilename): The Archive Filename object

Returns:
    str: Name extracted from the manifest or filename object. If no name
    is found in either of these sources, it tries to find a name from
    other attributes in the manifest. If no name is still found,
    returns an empty string.

functions.name: fluid_sbom.pkg.cataloger.java.parse_java_manifest.select_version
documentation:
Selects the version from the Java manifest or the archive file

Args:
    manifest (JavaManifest | None): The Java manifest file to extract
        version from, could be None
    filename_obj (ArchiveFilename): The archive file to extract version
        from

Returns:
    str: The version extracted from either the manifest or the archive
        file, returns an empty string if no version can be found.

functions.name: fluid_sbom.advisories.version.convert_to_maven_range
documentation:
Convert a list of version constraints to a Maven version range format.
According to this rules:
https://maven.apache.org/enforcer/enforcer-rules/versionRanges.html
